publicV1.reason: No /v1 operation, request/response schema, status code, or error body changes. The provisioning progress fields (TaskProvisioningProgressSchema) already exist on task reads since fix-large-repo-task-provisioning; this change only feeds real byte data into those existing fields during archive-variant workspace transfer. Stage vocabulary and failure projections are untouched.

mcp.reason: No MCP tool, argument, result, registration, or transport change. get_task inherits the already-declared progress fields through the canonical projection; only their runtime population changes.

openapi.reason: The OpenAPI projection is unchanged because no registry operation or schema changes; part-size tuning and box-side reassembly are outside the projection.

apiPlayground.reason: The Playground catalogs Public V1 operations only and gains no entry; existing task reads render the already-declared progress fields.

internalOnly.reason: Splits the boxlite archive-injection tar stream into daemon-body-limit-safe ordered parts (default 1.5MB, CAP_BOXLITE_ARCHIVE_PART_BYTES override) with in-box cat reassembly gated on byte-count plus SHA-256 verification, feeds byte-based transfer progress into the existing task_admission_work progress columns at a >=1s write throttle (du-estimated total, percent capped at 99, null when unestimable, silent skip under legacy admission), and hardens the injection integration fake daemon with the real 2MB body limit that the v0.45.0 tests failed to model.
